# Tasks - 2026-06-27

Companion to `.github/research/2026-06-27-plan.md`. Each task maps
1:1 to one GitHub issue created via `gh issue create
--label auto-implement,enhancement`. Engineering picks these up in
the listed order; the three are independent at the file level so
parallel pickup is also safe.

## Task 1 -- [mcp] Sanitize and cap MCP tool names

- **Issue**: #862
- **Category**: mcp
- **Size**: small (~3h)
- **Primary files**:
  - `src/mcp/client.ts` (new `sanitizeMcpToolName`, update
    `mapToolInfo` `:133`, `findToolServer` `:546`, `callTool` `:478`)
  - `tests/mcp/` (new `tool-name.test.ts` or extend `client.test.ts`)
- **Provides**: provider-safe MCP tool names so OpenAI-shaped
  deployments stop returning 400 on long names.
- **Depends on**: none.
- **Ordering**: pick second; #864 is lower-risk to ship first.

## Task 2 -- [command] `/queue` slash command

- **Issue**: #864
- **Category**: command
- **Size**: small (~2h)
- **Primary files**:
  - `src/cli/interactive.ts` (new `case 'queue':` near `:1085`,
    help-text update)
  - `tests/cli/queueCommand.test.ts` (NEW)
- **Provides**: ability to inspect and cancel queued follow-up
  prompts without killing the REPL.
- **Depends on**: none. Pure REPL state, no orchestrator coupling.
- **Ordering**: pick first; zero risk, smallest surface.

## Task 3 -- [config] Auto-disable route on permanent failure

- **Issue**: #863
- **Category**: config
- **Size**: small (~3h)
- **Primary files**:
  - `src/core/router.ts` (state map, `recordRouteOutcome`,
    `isRouteDisabled`, `resetRouteFailures`, `classifyRouteError`)
  - `src/config/routingConfig.ts` (new
    `routeFailureThreshold?: number` preference, default 3)
  - `src/core/orchestrator.ts`, `src/core/streamingOrchestrator.ts`,
    `src/core/agenticChat.ts` (record outcomes in catch / success)
  - `routing-config.example.json` (document new field)
  - `tests/core/router-autodisable.test.ts` (NEW)
- **Provides**: per-session route disable after 3x permanent
  failure (401 / 403 / 404 / `model_not_found` /
  `deployment_not_found`). Transient 5xx stays on `ErrorBackoff`.
- **Depends on**: none, but coexists with `src/core/error-backoff.ts`
  which keeps owning transient retries.
- **Ordering**: pick third. Largest blast radius (three orchestrator
  entry points), so it should land after the smaller two are green.

## Acceptance gate (all three)

Each task closes only when its issue's `Done when` checklist is
fully checked. The shared CI gate is the same:

```bash
npm run lint
npm run typecheck
npm run format:check
npm run test:coverage   # CI also enforces 40% lines
npm run build
```

No `--no-verify`, no `@ts-ignore`, no new runtime dependencies.
